name: Running Guys
short_description: A police officer, a thief, and a bag full of cash, with a hole in it. This is the story of a wild pursuit on this 2D platformer.
detailed_description:
Running Guys is a very small running game where a police officer chases a thief.

This game was developed in two weeks almost 10 years ago and revived recently (as many children enjoyed it at a science fair).

There is only one level (you should give it a chance :P), but we will rework this game in a few weeks to make it with Unreal Engine (mainly to test exports on different platforms).

You should definitely grab it now, as it has a low price :P


Little tip, when you just hit the ground after a jump or a fall, do a roll!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Spanish - Latin America*
*languages with full audio support
